stages.label: ZK-Enforced Runtime Captures
notes: Record real wallet runs for enable-mode and finalize.
Do not mark complete until Devnet explorer signatures exist for successful captures.

stages.label: External Audit Handoff
notes: The repository now includes an audit handoff package and explicit zk_enforced scope.
External findings and closure still need to happen outside the repository.

stages.label: Canonical Verifier Boundary Freeze
notes: Freeze whether receipt boundary or verifier-program boundary becomes canonical.
Do not claim final dominance until the written decision is signed off.
